entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.4.2
entry.content: Fixing broken killsanity act 2 location changes (oops). Also removing some broken locations in act 1 (yay). Removed 3 items that weren't playing nicely (eh).

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.5.1
entry.content:
# Version 0.5.1 Hotfix for critical bugs in version 0.5
## Features, Improvements, and Changes * Added instruction text for clarity in yaml generator
## Bug Fixes * Notification state now hashed by seed to avoid collision when creating more than one apworld with the same slotname and server. * Fixed (silly) bug in item sent notifications so it now actually works and doesn't fall back to the local cache ever because that doesn't make sense... * Fix remove row in yaml generator

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5.9
entry.content:
## What's New? - Achievement checks are now configurable — choose between all checks, a filtered set that excludes Charcoal Factory and Safety Last when appliance unlocks are off, or none at all - Five new traps added to the pool: Random Dish Extra, Random Side Dish, Tip Jar Drain, Good Advertisement, and Card Swap - You can now control how many appliance unlock items appear in the pool (10–93), giving you flexibility over how much progression gating you want - Appliances without an unlock item in the pool can now be toggled on or off in the shop - Cleaned up WebWorld so the options page looks a bit cleaner
## New YAML Options
**`trap_weights`** — Set the weight for each individual trap, letting you control which ones show up and how often. Set a trap's weight to 0 to remove it from the pool entirely.
**`money_cap_increase_count`** — Controls how many Money Cap Increase items the generator places into the item pool.
**`coin_filler_percent`** — Sets what percentage of your filler items will be coin pickups.
**`achievement_check_mode`** — Decides which achievement checks appear in your pool. `all` includes everything, `earned_only` filters out Charcoal Factory and Safety Last when appliance unlocks are disabled, and `none` removes achievement checks entirely.
**`appliance_unlock_pool_size`** — Controls how many appliance unlock items are placed in the pool, from 10 up to 93. Useful for making sure all the appliances you need for progression can actually show up.
**`unlocked_appliances_in_shop`** — Toggles whether appliances that don't have an unlock item in the pool are still available to buy in the shop.
**`extra_starting_cards`** — Adds extra cards to your starting hand using the same rules as difficulty cards — they carry over between runs and are removed via the Remove Card mechanic.
## Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 2.5.9](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/2.5.9)

entry.title: Ori and the Blind Forest v0.4.1
entry.content:
Fixes - Fixed generation issue related to the new Sein/SpiritFlame item
This version is meant to be used with any v0.4.x version of the client side mod.

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.6.1
entry.content:
- Purchasing Fertilizer or Bug Spray from the Zen Garden page of Crazy Dave's shop will now give you the correct amount. - Fixes a problem where Imitater would not correctly appear when unlocked. - Fixes a problem where Survival waves would not correctly send their check out. - Fixes a problem where shop images and text colours would not display correctly at first if entered directly via Zen Garden. - Fixes some generation issues. (Thanks gerbiljames!)
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v17.1.2
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Dungeon Dice Monsters v0.3.3
entry.content:
# v0.3.3 New Features
Compatibility with Universal Tracker! - Duelists and Dice Collection locations in-logic lists are now accurate in UT. - To enable this, starting duelists (in Free Duel progression) and starting dice (when randomized only) are given to the player by the multiworld instead of having the client generate them. These can be seen now in your games spoiler logs. - All dice items are now tagged as Progression.
# Documentation Links
[Info About YuGiOh DDM Randomizer](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/en_YuGiOh!%20Dungeon%20Dice%20Monsters.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/setup_en.md) [Grandpa's Shop Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Grandpas%20Shop%20Guide.md)

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.0
entry.content:
# Changes from 0.7.8
## Changes to Options * Added Option **Closed Gaia**, allowing players to block areas of Gaia's Garden until additional items are found. (@buanjautista) * Added Option **Rhombus Hub Unlock**, allowing players to enter areas like Gaia's Garden as soon as the correct shade is found. (@AdamStagg) * Added Option **Goal**, allowing players to choose between creator goal (Vermillion Tower) and monkey goal (Grand Krys'kajo). (@CodeTriangle)
## Changes to Mod * Added **Deathlink** support to the mod, accessible through the Archipelago Settings UI. (@heartles)
# Changes from 0.8.0-pre.3
## Changes to Logic
* Made **Maroon Tree Defender** an Always Quest.
## Changes to Generation
* The APWorld now emits an OptionError when generating with Observatory Goal but no Quest Randomization.
# Migration Guide
* Players using versions 0.7.8 and 0.8.0-pre.3 of the mod should see no adverse side effects from upgrading to 0.8.0 of the mod. Please contact us if you do.

entry.title: Metroid Zero Mission v0.5.1
entry.content:
- Fixed a game crash when picking up a Metroid DNA - Fixed Universal Tracker not accounting for your Spring Ball option
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lilDavid/Archipelago-Metroid-Zero-Mission/compare/0.5.0...0.5.1

entry.title: Lethal Company v0.7.10b0
entry.content:
Mod: * fixed a rare issue with item processing where an item could be processed before the item map is set up and cause cascading errors * the log now warns users if Lethal Expansion is installed * corrected logic for "Log - Autopilot" and "Log - Real Job" * the death link message now correctly includes the slot name Apworld: * corrected logic for "Log - Autopilot", "Log - Real Job", and "Log - Desmond"
Mod version 0.7.10 works with apworld versions 0.7.7 - 0.7.10.

entry.title: The Messenger v0.6.6
entry.content: This alternate version of the The Messenger apworld has integration for portal and transition shuffle with [Universal Tracker](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1367270230635839539). In bonus, it tracks glitched logic and has a PopTracker integration, to follow where you are and which checks are available on your second monitor! Compatible with games generated with [Archipelago 0.6.6](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.6) ## Installation Instructions (for Windows, but likely compatible with other systems) - Install Archipelago (link below) with the generator enabled. - Place the new `messenger.apworld` file in your custom world folder. - Remove the old `messenger.apworld` file from your `lib/worlds` folder. - When connecting to a _The Messenger_ seed with UT, you will be prompted to locate a The Messenger Track Pack (downloadable [here](https://github.com/alwaysintreble/TheMessengerTrackPack/releases)). If needed, you can change the location in your `host.yaml` in your Archipelago installation. ## Troubleshooting - Make sure you removed your `messenger.apworld` from `lib/worlds` and added the new apworld in `custom_worlds` - Report any issue in the [_#messenger_](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1090822939697500243) channel in the Archipelago discord. Make sure to ping @jouramie otherwise I won't read. ## We Need Your Help! If you'd like to help integrate this into the main Archipelago releases, drop a [comment](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/pull/6030)! :wink: Also, please mention in the [_#messenger_](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1090822939697500243) channel that you used it, and report any issue. This will help with the integration process if some player mention using the beta world!

entry.title: PEAK v0.5.8
entry.content:
# FIXES IMPROVEMENTS U NAME IT
  • Items are locked and won't spawn until they are first recieved through AP
  • Some potential mitigation against crashing due to picking up items and releasing games
  • Zoom Trap protections incase it gets stuck active
  • AP Connection UI will now only show once hosting the game
  • Campfires will show a hint to Progressive Mountain
  • Potential fix for Daredevil Badge not triggering
  • 24 Karat Badge in logic fixed
  • EnergyLink values rebalanced & EnergyLink improved thanks to Jacks5
  • All items have the same weight in the loot pools and all multiplayer only items skip the multiplayer check when spawning
  • Afflictions will kill you with additional stamina bars enabled now
Thanks Jack5 for the EnergyLink improvements :D

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5.8
entry.content:
## What's New? - Fixed the game name capitalization to "PlateUp" (it's the little things) - Added `trap_chance` — control exactly what percentage of your filler slots become traps - Added filler percentage options for Patience Increase, Less Customers, Group Size Decrease, and Mess Reduction — tune your filler pool to your liking - Added `money_cap_activation` — choose whether your gold cap updates instantly or waits until the start of the next day - Added `global_patience_starting_debuff` — set how much patience is knocked off at the start of your run (it'll always recover to normal with all upgrades) - Clarified and cleaned up YAML option descriptions across the board - The Archipelago options page is now fully supported — you can build your YAML there instead of editing the file manually!
## New YAML Options **`trap_chance`** — Sets what percentage of your remaining filler slots turn into traps. At 0 it falls back to the old auto-scaling behavior; at 100 it's wall-to-wall chaos
**`patience_filler_percent`** — How much of your filler pool to fill with Patience Increase items, giving you temporary customer patience buffs throughout the run
**`customer_filler_percent`** — How much of your filler pool to fill with Less Customers items, occasionally giving you a lighter service day
**`group_size_filler_percent`** — How much of your filler pool to fill with Group Size Decrease items, reducing how many people show up per table
**`mess_reduction_percent`** — How much of your filler pool to fill with Mess Reduction items, cutting down on cleanup burden during a day
**`money_cap_activation`** — Controls when a gold cap increase kicks in: either the moment you receive it, or at the start of your next cooking day
**`global_patience_starting_debuff`** — How much patience is shaved off at the very start of your run. Recovers to normal as you collect Global Patience Increase items
## Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 0.2.5.8](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.5.8)

entry.title: untitled_goose_game v2.2
entry.content:
Just a small but important update. Mia has taken the reins lately, so I can focus on BK and Salt. Cheers Mia!
Fixes:
1. Open an umbrella inside TV shop no longer requires Pub access, instead of High Street access 2. All speedrun tasks appropriately require all relevant tasks rather than just the final one of the area 3. Players should no longer ever be expected to drop a draggable item in the well 4. The Souls menu in the UI now properly displays Miniature Goose 5. Changes:
Additions
1. Connection window now has a "Hide" button so streamers can now hide the lobby info from viewers 2. The Connect button should now hopefully fix incorrect access flags 3. Updated the installation instructions to include Linux setup (big thanks to Whizzlefern for these!)

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.20
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed the Pokédex seen count not being sent completely to Poptracker - Fixed unit test failures on GitHub due to the `ndspy` library missing - Fixed adding an Encounter Plando on a nonexistent slot leading to an error - Disabled Johto-exclusive balls from being shuffled into the itempool, as they're unusable ingame - You can still send them via server commands though - Changed the trades bitmap for Poptracker to indicate the first time talking to the NPC instead of a finished trade - Actually fixed the sandwich minigame on Village Bridge not being repeatable on the same day - Fixed the Pokédex areas keeping the vanilla locations even if wild encounters are randomized or plando'd - Fixed the Master Ball seller in N's Castle soft locking the game
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.20 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
## Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.21
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Added `Experience Multiplier` option - Also added a menu to the PC in Pokémon Centers to adjust it ingame - Added `All Pokémon Seen` option - Fixed compatibility issues with AP 0.6.7 release candidates - Fixed player names with too many non-Ascii characters leading to a corrupted rom - Tweaked the menu structure of the PC in Pokémon Centers - Fixed backwards compatibility issues with old yamls - Tweaked option descriptions to make them a bit more Options Creator-friendly - Reworked `any_badge` and `any_tm_hm` once again
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.21 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
## Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.1.4
entry.content: and everything seems to break There might be another update tomorrow or the day after with the pr's CosmicWolf has submitted and then I will be focusing on minimal logic (this will be my 4 and hopefully last attempt at getting logic fully working, the plan is to keep best logic though and supplement the issues it has using minimal) # Changelog: - Fixed and stub documented for facpacks additional logic - Fixed `excluded_first_pool` in the bob's pack - Issue brought up by @ttv_willthe_yt (no more going out awhile to get first science on new gens) - Added warning to setting type files for unknown settings - Added more guards for invalid items in best logic - Issue brought up by @mannamedgarbo (would be great if you could test this with Voidblock)

entry.title: Astalon v0.27.1
entry.content:
- Fix logic issue with RoA centaur region - APWorld only fix, mod version is still v0.27.0
**More Information**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago/blob/astalon/worlds/astalon/docs/en_Astalon.md **Setup Guide**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago/blob/astalon/worlds/astalon/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.4.1
entry.content: - Tweaked how secret exits are checked to hopefully make them more consistent. - Fixed missing logic for the Insurrectionist in 8-1.

entry.title: Crash2 v0.3.0rc0
entry.content:
Note: this is a pre release and hasn't been tested extensively past just basic features,
## Changes:
**Warp Randomizer:** - Option to randomize the warp room portals to lead to different levels - Secret warp room portals are randomized separately from the rest of the portals due to limitations in the game's code - Collected gem/crystal locations will show up in their vanilla location
**Traps:** - Customizable chance to replace filler lives/wumpa with traps with a customizable duration - Big/Small Crash Trap - Scales Crash's size - No Lives Trap - Temporarily lose all your lives - Jetpack Controls - 😵
**Known Issues:** - No lives trap gives back more lives than it should when you gameover - Jetpack controls has not been tested with analog input, it'll probably just be weird and truly unplayable

entry.title: Hammerwatch v4.1
entry.content:
This update greatly decreases the size of the apworld (68 MB to 4.2 MB!) and renames some locations for clarity
Get the latest client release here: https://github.com/Parcosmic/HammerwatchAPMod/releases

entry.title: Gauntlet Legends v2.1.2
entry.content:
REQUIRED: Archipelago -> https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases REQUIRED: Retroarch -> https://www.retroarch.com/?page=platforms Drag and drop gl.apworld into your custom_worlds folder in your Archipelago install.
You can launch the client from ArchipelagoLauncher, just click on the Gauntlet Legends Client button.
To patch the game, you are required to have a US copy of Gauntlet Legends for the N64. Either drag the patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe or Right click the patch and 'Open With...' ArchipelagoLauncher.exe The host does not need to have a copy of the game to generate.
RETROARCH IS REQUIRED IT IS THE ONLY EMULATOR THAT WILL WORK.
IN RETROARCH: You must go to Settings->User Interface and turn the Show Advanced Settings ON. Then in Settings-> Network, you must also turn ON Network Commands. Leave the port the default.
Make sure you use Mupen64-plus-next in Retroarch as your core.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/GauntletLegendsAP/compare/v2.1.0...v2.1.2

entry.title: Stardew Valley v7.4.4
entry.content:
## Apworld - Fixed logic rule for Morel seasons [@itepastra]
## Mod - Introduced new TesterFeature to make the Traveling Cart stock unlimited. This should be generally considered a cheat, as it invalidates the related AP items and allows going heavily OoL - Removed some log from MultiplayerVision - Made MultiplayerVision default to true. If this causes trouble I'll revert it. - Introduced new config to automatically end the day after a certain number of failed reconnection attempts. Defaults to disabled (-1), but this would allow players who have encountered crashes to at least attempt to save their game before it happens. - Added 16 baby names. A lot of them should have been added a while ago, sorry! [New Names](https://github.com/agilbert1412/StardewArchipelago/compare/9eed7013553c8b30f29019c79dcdb8272c857fa5..ba0bb82a5e911083d95a0864898da50c8954eecf) - Fixed the Jojapocalypse filters accidentally filtering the Kent C Bundle to meeting Kent - Added a bunch of name matching exceptions for tooltips

entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.18.0
entry.content:
**Changes (Should be compatible with 0.16+ worlds, but may cause issues)**
- Added Weapon Randomizer (Optional) - Added Class Randomizer (Optional) - Re-added Hints to the Game (Upgraded In game menu) - Re-added messages on send / receive items to the game - Properly Packaged apworld for version typing - Added starter item autofill based on YAML - Made Shop More Responsive on Item Purchasing - Added more Info to Info Console and renamed it to "Checks Console"
**INFO FILES** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint)

entry.title: Spyro 3 v1.3.2
entry.content:
**Note that setup instructions have changed slightly in v1.3.0+. Within Duckstation, navigate to Settings > Game Properties > Console and select "Interpreter" under "Execution Mode".**
This release contains both Client (S3AP.Desktop.exe) and APWorld changes.
New Features - Implemented Received Items tab. - Implemented new client commands like !options, particularly useful for random settings. Type !help to see the full list!
Changes - Simplified option descriptions - Clarified World Key behavior in the client with messages on receiving keys and when locked from progressing. - Improved Options Creator user experience - Progressive client improvements
Bug Fixes: - Fixed a bug where gaining a life in Midnight Mountain Home could erroneously set your lives to 99. - Fixed an error in the logic of a gem in Sunny Villa. - (Hopefully) fixed a bug where goaling could freeze the client and not send out the goal. - If you still encounter this issue, restart the client and reconnect to send the goal.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.0
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.0
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.0.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.0
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.4.2
entry.content: - Fixed incorrect logic for 1-1: Secret Exit. - Fixed incorrect logic for the blue skull path of 8-3. - Added secret exits to the act summary.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.5.0
entry.content: Purchasing Sewer Key from Jen Heard is now a check. Keypad door in sewer is now a check. Sewer Office property now an item when randomizing drug making properties Sewer key randomization blocks.

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.1
entry.content:
## Changes to Generation
* Made changes to item groups (@CodeTriangle) * Renamed certain item groups to be more user-friendly (i.e. `fillerCommonCons` -> `Common Consumables`). * Added several item groups to better classify common items. * Removed the `required` item group, whose name is misleading and whose contents are varied and don't group together well. * **PLEASE NOTE**: These changes will only be available in worlds generated using 0.8.1 of the APWorld or greater. * Raise `OptionError` if both consumable_weight and drop_weight are zero (@gerbiljames) * Currently, doing this will result in an unhelpful generic python error.
## Changes to Logic
* Updated logic around the **Crocus Pocus** questline and associated locations (@CodeTriangle) * Logic now actually tracks the number of plants the player is able to farm instead of trying to work around it using regions.
## Fixes to Logic
* **Gaia's Garden Collect** now requires access to the Grove and Infested areas of Gaia's Garden (@FuyumiSogeki) * Update logic surrounding Ascension Temple to no longer require Shock (@kumquat-ir) * This is due to a change in CC-Open-World where the rocks in Wheel Passage were removed,. * Update logic surrounding the lower floors of Temple Mine (@kumquat-ir) * Multiple doors can be reached upon acquiring heat but the randomizer assumes that one unlocks after the other.

entry.title: Manual_Walkabout_MusicBlox v2.2.0
entry.content:
Updated to support the new Hollywood course!
Bug Fix: - Non-linear logic was using the easy pars for logic on the hard courses. This has been fixed.
## What's Changed * Added Hollywood by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/walkabout-mini-golf-ap-manual/pull/41 * Set the correct index for hard course, non linear par logic by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/walkabout-mini-golf-ap-manual/pull/42
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/walkabout-mini-golf-ap-manual/compare/2.1.0...2.2.0

entry.title: ToeJam and Earl v0.5.1
entry.content:
## Big changes
- Mailbox checks have been added! Set `mailbox_checks: yes` to enable. While the logic is not super-strict and has a buffer for "misspending", it assumes you won't spend any bucks at all on friendly Earthling services, so you may want to enable `free_earthling_services` to reduce the chance of accidentally bricking a seed. - Moles will not steal Extra Buck or Jackpot presents if mailbox checks are enabled - Mailbox purchase state is saved along with the rest of the save data - Extra Buck and Jackpot presents can now be made to auto-open on receipt (from other worlds only) by setting `auto_buck_presents: yes`. - Presentsanity has been added, which makes every present a Mystery Present. Set `presentsanity: yes` to enable. Note that the logic may still force-add a small number of Promotions to ensure the seed is beatable.
## Other changes
- The custom item sprites have all been shrunk down to standard present size to allow rendering in mailboxes (thanks, DrKelexo!) - Rank logic has been redone. Generation with random YAMLs now fails at a rate of around 0.3%. - Added location groups for level reaches and mailboxes - Promotions can no longer be awarded for ranking up - The restored unused present sprites will no longer replace the Mystery Present or Bonus Hitops sprites - Randomizer presents are no longer factored into logic (i.e. it assumes you won't open them at all)
## Bugfixes
- "Bacon'n eggs" now has the correct name - Fixed "denied" sound not randomizing in sound rando - Fixed an issue that sometimes stopped Big Item checks from awarding items - Fixed a logic issue with reach level checks
## Note on filesize
The size of the AP world has ballooned because I am now vendoring [unidecode](https://github.com/avian2/unidecode), a Python package for intelligently flattening Unicode text to standard ASCII. This package is used to ensure the mailbox item names are always displayable using the game's limited ASCII subset.

entry.title: Minecraft v2.0.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Add Trial Chamber Structure Compasses + Misc. Fixes by @Seatori in https://github.com/qixils/Archipelago/pull/5 * Add Shulker Boxes to Item Pool by @Seatori in https://github.com/qixils/Archipelago/pull/7 * Add support for creating items with multiple classifications by @Seatori in https://github.com/qixils/Archipelago/pull/9 * Logic & Documentation changes for 1.21.11+ by @Seatori in https://github.com/qixils/Archipelago/pull/10 * Update Item+Location ID System by @MrRedstone54 in https://github.com/qixils/Archipelago/pull/8 * Explicit Universal Tracker support for Minecraft by @Seatori in https://github.com/qixils/Archipelago/pull/11 * Fix client save management by @qixils * Update mod to 1.21.11 by @MrRedstone54 * Lock recipes for Saddle, Copper Ingot, Resin Clump, Block of Resin by @Seatori in https://github.com/qixils/NeoForgeAP/pull/6
Generation version bumped to v10. The client UI remains compatible with previous versions of the mod (though any previous servers may no longer be listed in the UI as their metadata was broken; the .apmc just needs to be reimported).

entry.title: Rift of the Necrodancer v0.11.0
entry.content:
# Additions - [APWorld] Added VA-11 HALL-A and Spin Rhythm Songs
# Changes - [APWorld] Added an "All" DLC to include all DLC songs - [APWorld] Rearranged item groups - Free songs from paid DLC packs are now included with their respective DLC pack item group - Shovel Knight songs now actually have an item group - Rift Anniversary songs are now part of the "Anniversary" item group - "Free Promo" item group now named "Free DLC". Meat Boy and Anniversary songs are also grouped here
# Bug Fixes - [Client + APWorld] Goal song now properly unlocks if goal song is set to a custom rift - [Client] Necrodancer and Deep Blues boss battles now send their locations properly - [APWorld] Now gives a more useful error if the custom song data is wrong https://github.com/studkid/Archipelago/pull/4 - [APWorld] Fixed a state leak when playing with multiple RotN players https://github.com/studkid/Archipelago/pull/5

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.23
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed hidden items (that are recurring in vanilla) not being checked - Fixed crashes in the Pokédex due to missing flags for alternate forms - Added `enable_arm7_expansion_test` setting
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.21 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
## Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.12.post2
entry.content:
# Incompatible with any other AP Version
## Changes + Location and Item IDs are now hard coded and reduce to a lower number + Ingame Randomizer updated to include traps + New Randomitzer tab for option that give you items at the start of the run + Potions move to Client `Bonus Start` tab

entry.title: Minecraft v2.0.0
entry.content:
### What's Changed
- [mod] Fixed crash on killing wither skeleton - [apworld] Fixed missing ".apmc" file extension on generation

entry.title: Pseudoregalia v0.10.2
entry.content:
**IMPORTANT: This release requires a fresh install, even if you have a previous version of the mod installed.**
APWorld changes: * Wrote out docs for web host. * Added expert clause: entering tower with Slide and one Cling Shard.
Client changes: * Updated the UE4SS dependency.
For releases between 0.7.2 and this one, [click here](https://github.com/qwint/pseudoregalia-archipelago/releases).

entry.title: ToeJam and Earl v0.5.2
entry.content:
## Big changes
- New toggleable option: `flat_promotions`, which makes Promotions award a large number of points instead of bumping you up to the next rank. The exact number depends on rank scaling. - New toggleable option: `auto_flat_promotions`, which makes flat Promotions received from other worlds open automatically
## Other changes
- Presentsanity is now 100% Mystery Presents: it no longer adds extra Promotion presents to the pool, and the starting inventory is now forced to be Mystery Presents - Added aliases for various options for convenience (e.g. "vanilla" and "base" are now interchangeable in option names, amongst other things) - Small adjustments to the timing of the custom text for map reveals/elevator keys to reduce the chance of missing it
## Bugfixes
- Fixed a logic bug that caused Jackpot and Extra Buck presents to be considered permanently collected

entry.title: Minecraft v2.0.0
entry.content:
### What's Changed
- [mod] Fixed Dragon Egg Shards not being received - [apworld] Fixed client UI not opening

entry.title: YAYARG v2.5.0
entry.content:
## Yet Another YARG AP V2.5.2
### Client Changes - Added a config option to automatically open the connection window on game launch. - Fix an occasional crash when receiving an item while in the Song Library (*hopefully*).
### YAML Creator Changes - Added a new **YAML Settings** tab for additional options, including Progression Balancing and Accessibility. - Added a `worst case` value to seed stats. Shows the maximum possible playtime for each pool assuming the longest songs are selected. - Added new options to help trim large song lists to stay under the recommended limits: - `Remove Unplaceable Songs` removes songs that don’t fit into any pool. - `Pregenerate Selected Setlist` chooses the smallest random subset of songs needed to generate a seed with your settings. - If enabled, you must generate a new YAML for each seed or you will reuse the same setlist every time. - **Highly recommended for large multiworlds.** - It is not recommended to manually edit the YAML after export if either of these options is enabled. - Fix DeathLink and EnergyLink settings not loading from cache.
Tested against [YARG nightly b3564](https://github.com/YARC-Official/YARG-Bleedingedge/releases/tag/b3564) ***Newer version may be incompatible.***
This version is compatible with V2.5.0
Setup Guide: https://github.com/Thedrummonger/Archipelago/blob/YARGV2/worlds/yayarg/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v18.0.0
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v18.0.1
entry.content:
### This apworld is a beta apworld, only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 (in RC as of the release of this release)
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: PEAK v0.5.9rc1
entry.content:
## v0.5.9-rc.1
  • Items being locked and randomized spawns is now an option in the yaml called ItemSanity
  • Experimental BreathLink Support: Complete loss of Stamina linked to other BreathLinked games
  • Trap Queue system to reduce trap spam
  • Connection UI moved into pause menu under Archipelago button
  • Archipelago Settings in game now includes toggling DeathLink, TrapLink, RingLink/HardRingLink, BreathLink on the fly
  • Small handful of new traps
  • Milk & Idol invincibility fixed
  • Some badge logic fixed
  • Potential fix for Basketball checks
  • In Game Items as Items severely reduced to reduce potential crashing. Instead there's a handful of filler items so not every item can be sent to you.
### Notes High Altitude Badge is currently disabled as a check until further notice

entry.title: Rain World v1.5.1
entry.content:
# See [the setup page](https://github.com/alphappy/ArchipelagoRW/blob/v1.5.0/worlds/rain_world/docs/setup_en.md) for instructions. # This release is intended to be used with [v1.5.3 of the client](https://github.com/SaltiestSyrup/RWRandomizer/releases/tag/v1.5.3). # Scroll down to Assets to find the player YAML templates and the .apworld.
## Player YAML Settings - Added Pearl, Gooieduck, and Beehive filler items (4f4973a4d26d38b27a127e636ff172db3e947d8f) - Added Responsibility, Ripple Spawn, and Blizzard Lizard trap items (b776627c7813dba3962b9e7ea4d40e1766fde2e1)
## Logic Changes / Fixes - Pomegranates are now considered a valid vegetarian food for Monk access calculations (33b49113c732e1a9b9b1a3962d5d80f5928c580e) - The Scholar passage will now check for access to three regions containing pearls (2edfe48f82f4d4dc605b881142e6df4f66f35f80) - It is now considered possible to travel backwards from Survivor spawn to Outskirts filtration as Saint or with any explosive jump (63ab7d25255456b3a8f7c4e3544f7371a5bef76b) - The flower in WSKD_B40 now requires some vertical mobility to be in logic (1c8533c09239bd443039a6c6f4a9731c12bea146) - Bitter Aerie checks will now generate for Saint (2a90d7f61ce9039b927338053c0b34643c2eaad6) - Inv is now considered able to achieve the Mother passage (35efd0994d5f89c5b15ac6f1197ca55531955f5e)
## Generation Fixes - Fix inaccuracies in logic determining which regions are valid starts (bc81c9ceaeca2a4589d114e11036b6b4f1931003) - Fix area above LttM being in logic for Rivulet when Submerged Superstructure is disabled (d033b83a425b1016bc3b49bb4b73879d288d2ecb) - Survivor and Monk no longer expected to complete "Red Centipede / Aquapede" food quest when Submerged Superstructure is disabled, as the only normal spawn in these campaigns is the aquapede near the gate (d033b83a425b1016bc3b49bb4b73879d288d2ecb) - Watcher is no longer expected to complete "Red Centipede / Aquapede" food quest when rotted region checks are disabled, as the only normal spawn is in Infested Wastes (d033b83a425b1016bc3b49bb4b73879d288d2ecb) - Phony warp checks in Ancient Urban removed, added a Spinning Top location in their place (b418a9371cc64b2cabbeb1977fdebb5637861229) - `passage_priority` option was previously completely non-functional, it now works as described (6865adabef347570ebeba7d0d0aa779e67156b0d) - Saint's non-existing "Exterior to Shoreline" gate has had the item removed (2a90d7f61ce9039b927338053c0b34643c2eaad6)
## Technical Fixes - Event locations are now sorted before being added to pool, to pass determinism tests (4fd13362b77f94be4b3a0e0397e29c44bbef6d6a)

entry.title: Portal 2 v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Additions - Universal Tracker now yamlless (thanks to James) - Icons now on the individual maps to indicate completed checks of and within maps - Clicking Chapter titles now sends you to the latest incomplete map in the chapter - Added automated testing for future development ease
## Bug Fixes - UT now working - Menu generation for empty chapters now works as intended
## Note You must use the latest (v0.6.0) version of the [Portal 2 Archipelago Mod](https://github.com/GlassToadstool/Portal2ArchipelagoMod/releases/tag/0.6.0) with this version of the apworld.

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.6.6
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.6.6 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md).
# Changes - Fixed the text client printing empty lines - Fixed a misspelling in `Moodlesanity - Stimulated` [APWorld Change] - Deathlink messages now add punctuation to the cause if it didn't come with it already - Changed the Depression Trap to say "Mood" instead of "Happiness" - Disfigured Trap is now more violent - Moved some item IDs around [APWorld Change] - Added fillers for each of the crystal shards [APWorld Change] - The APWorld will now fail early if there are more progression items than locations, instead of cascading to a generation fail [APWorld Change] - The APWorld now requires Archipelago 0.6.6 [APWorld Change]
# Known Issues Getting two traps in quick succession can cause the incorrect slot name inside the trap Moodle Recipes may sometimes wipe themselves upon reconnection. Getting another recipe item triggers a failsafe that should fix this Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.6.5...v0.6.6
